title: AISC 360-22 Weld Group Coefficient Calculator
description: Determine the Weld Group Coefficient and Capacity based on AISC 360-22.

des_allow.description: Design Methodology. Symbol: -. Choice between Allowable Strength Design (ASD) and Load and Resistance Factor Design (LRFD) methodologies.

weldPattern.description: Weld Shape. Symbol: -. Type of welding pattern to be used.
x-enumLabels: Double Vertical Line Out of Plane

LV1.description: Length. Symbol: L_v. Units: in. Vertical Weld Length (for DHL, the vertical spacing between the welds).

LH1.description: Width. Symbol: L_h. Units: in. Horizontal Weld Length (for DVL, the horizontal spacing between the welds).

W_unit.description: Fillet Weld Size. Symbol: W_s. Units: in

Fexx_unit.description: Weld Electrode Material. Symbol: F_{exx}. Determines the electrode tensile strength (Fexx).

P_ult.description: Magnitude (P). Symbol: P. Units: kip. Applied load magnitude, considering relevant load combinations, that is supported by the weld group

angle_rl.description: Angle. Symbol: θ. Units: °. Applied load angle (positive values are rotated clockwise from the downward direction).

ALBP.description: Applied load basepoint. Symbol: ALBP. Select the insertion point to be used in the analysis.

x_load.description: X Coordinate Offset. Symbol: ecc_x. Units: in. X coordinate of the applied load, relative to the insertion point to be used in the analysis.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
